notes: DEV-ONLY cheap probe, v2 of exp_027. SINGLE variable changed from exp_027: SYSTEM_PROMPT_MATH now PROTECTS closed-form symbolic constants (pi, e, sqrt) — keep symbolic, don't decimalize — plugging the exp_027 id=429 leak (model turned e^2 into 7.389..., gold wanted e^2). MCQ prompt byte-identical to exp_024/exp_027. model_id (pass-4), sampling, vLLM sizing all identical. split=dev (200 q). Goal: confirm the exp_027 FF precision gain (4 per-case recoveries: id=32,217,457,1027) holds/grows AND the symbolic->decimal regression disappears, without MCQ regression (MCQ delta is pure sampling noise since prompt unchanged). Baseline = 200-dev subset of exp_024's public_responses.jsonl. exp_018 (0.628) is the hard floor; promote to a full board run only if dev confirms.
